vibe: Warm, inviting, efficient, tactile. Bridges the gap between cozy restaurant dining and high-speed staff operations. Prioritizes clarity, real-time collaboration, and an appetizing visual aesthetic.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for cards. Grid gap-6 or gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6. High density for staff, breathable for customers.
spacing_and_layout.menu_grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. gap-6. Images must be prominent and enticing.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Soft borders, border-[#EAE3D9], rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a friendly organic feel.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows. shadow-sm or shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,54,47,0.06)]

components.buttons: rounded-full or rounded-xl. Primary buttons in Terracotta (#D45D3F). Add hover state with slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.cards: Surface white (#FFFFFF) or glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). Avoid boxy sharp edges.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI base. bg-[#FAF8F5] border border-[#EAE3D9] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D45D3F] focus:border-transparent rounded-xl.
components.tabs: Clear order line tabs (Placed, Confirmed, Preparing, Ready, Served). Use active pill shape with primary_brand background.
components.toast: Use Sonner for toasts. Custom styled to match organic theme.
components.debug_panel: Floating global panel (bottom right). Toggleable. Glassmorphism dark (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md) with monospace green/red text for errors/WS logs. Must always be accessible.
components.customer_pin_badge: Persistent sticky header element. Floating at the top. Glassmorphism to let the menu scroll underneath.

motion.list_items: staggered entrance animations for order queues and menu items
motion.cart_update: Subtle scale pop when item added/updated via WS

views_and_flows.customer_onboarding: No generic landing. Scan QR -> URL ?qr=<qrToken> -> Phone Number Input -> Create/Join Table (PIN generation/input) -> Menu.
views_and_flows.customer_menu: Bento-style appetizing food cards. Floating 'Shared Cart' FAB with live item count and real-time collaborative updates. Real-time status tracking.
views_and_flows.staff_login: Centered auth card. Username/password only. Background: warm cozy restaurant interior image overlay.
views_and_flows.staff_waiter_dash: Kanban-like or list view: Pending (confirm), Ready to serve. Ability to edit/remove PLACED items.
views_and_flows.staff_kitchen_dash: Queue of CONFIRMED/PREPARING. Tap to advance status.
views_and_flows.staff_cashier_dash: Pending bills. Bill generation modal (tax, discount). Payment method selector (Cash/Card/UPI).

icons.style: Friendly, slightly rounded edges, 2px stroke width.

backgrounds.description: Warm cozy restaurant interior. Use for Staff Login background with heavy bg-black/50 overlay.

food_items.description: Vegetable salad. Use for menu item placeholder.
Pasta on white plate. Use for menu item placeholder.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

technical_constraints: Use JavaScript (.jsx/.js), DO NOT use TypeScript (.tsx/.ts).
All components must be functional React components.
Rely heavily on React Context or Zustand for shared WebSocket states.
Real-time WebSocket events must map cleanly to UI updates.
